title: coronilla libanotica
intro: Coronilla libanotica, also known as Rockrose or Syrian Valerian, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce anxiety due to its sedative and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Coronilla libanotica include its potential to alleviate insomnia, restlessness, and other sleep disorders, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and relieve menstrual cramps. Coronilla libanotica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, with typical dosages ranging from 1-3 grams per day, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
